title: Smartico Founded as First Unified Gamification and CRM Solution for iGaming
summary: Smartico.ai, founded in 2019, built the first unified Gamification and CRM Automation solution specifically for iGaming, integrating real-time gamification mechanics with CRM automation workflows, multi-channel communication tools, and loyalty program management.

title: Smartico Remains Fully Independent Following Partnership Discussions
summary: Smartico and Optimove announced they will remain fully independent companies, each continuing to innovate and grow the iGaming CRM marketing industry. Smartico was recognized as the company that brought gamification combined with CRM marketing to iGaming.

title: Smartico Exhibiting at ICE Barcelona 2026 with Real-Time Retention Platform
summary: Smartico is showcasing its unified CRM and gamification platform at ICE Barcelona 2026, featuring real-time retention capabilities using email, SMS, pop-ups, push notifications, and customized segmentations to prevent churn.

title: Advanced Gamification Features for 2026 Include Multi-Virtual Currency Support
summary: Smartico's 2026 gamification suite includes multi-virtual currency support, real-time automation, deep segmentation with hundreds of data points, seamless omnichannel integration, and comprehensive analytics for measuring gamification impact.

title: AI-Driven Predictive Personalization Enhancing Smartico Gamification Strategy
summary: Smartico is implementing AI-driven predictive personalization to enhance gamification, anticipating player needs and offering specially crafted experiences. The platform uses hundreds of data points for individualized gamified experiences.

title: Smartico Integrates Missions, Leaderboards, and Progress Mechanics for Engagement
summary: Research published by Frontiers in Psychology supports Smartico's approach showing that progress mechanics and variable rewards significantly increase sustained engagement. Smartico's platform features points, missions, leaderboards, and badges as scientifically proven engagement drivers.

title: Smartico Offers Responsible Gaming Tools for Compliance and Player Protection
summary: Smartico's 2026 CRM platform includes responsible gaming tools featuring behavioral flags, self-exclusion tracking, and spend limit monitoring to help operators meet compliance requirements and protect players.

title: Smartico Provides Omnichannel Communication Across Web, Mobile, Email, SMS, and Push
summary: Smartico's unified platform enables seamless omnichannel integration engaging players consistently across web, mobile apps, email, SMS, and push notifications with real-time personalization based on player behavior.
